dashboard.label: MCP Security Posture
dashboard.description: OWASP MCP Top 10 security findings from mcpsec scans

search.query: index=mcpsec sourcetype=_json | spath output=severity_id path=severity_id | eval severity=case( severity_id=1, "Info", severity_id=2, "Low", severity_id=3, "Medium", severity_id=4, "High", severity_id=5, "Critical", true(), "Unknown" ) | stats count by severity | sort -count

index=mcpsec sourcetype=_json | spath output=rule_id path=finding_info.uid | eval category=case( rule_id="MCP-01", "Tool Poisoning", rule_id="MCP-02", "Excessive Permissions", rule_id="MCP-03", "Tool Shadowing", rule_id="MCP-04", "Rug Pull Attacks", rule_id="MCP-05", "Auth Bypass", rule_id="MCP-06", "Implicit Trust", rule_id="MCP-07", "Config Injection", rule_id="MCP-08", "Insecure Storage", rule_id="MCP-09", "Insufficient Logging", rule_id="MCP-10", "Resource Exhaustion", true(), "Other" ) | stats count by category | sort -count
index=mcpsec sourcetype=_json | spath output=server_name path=resource.name | stats count by server_name | sort -count | head 10

index=mcpsec sourcetype=_json | spath output=rule_id path=finding_info.uid | spath output=title path=finding_info.title | spath output=description path=finding_info.desc | spath output=severity_id path=severity_id | spath output=server_name path=resource.name | eval severity=case( severity_id=1, "Info", severity_id=2, "Low", severity_id=3, "Medium", severity_id=4, "High", severity_id=5, "Critical", true(), "Unknown" ) | table _time, rule_id, title, severity, server_name, description | sort -_time | head 50
